item.title: Treasures Found in the River Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares surprising finds that reveal everyday history along the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Treasures Found in the River Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares surprising finds that reveal everyday history along the river. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Fascinating 1720s Mudlark Find
item.description: Nicola White explores a 1720s find from the Thames foreshore, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Fascinating 1720s Mudlark Find
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a 1720s find from the Thames foreshore, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Strange Thames Ruler: What Did It Measure?
item.description: Nicola White explores a strange ruler found in the Thames and considers what it may have measured. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a strange ruler found in the Thames and considers what it may have measured. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Why 19th Century Poison Bottles Were Blue
item.description: Exploring why 19th-century poison bottles were made bright blue, with insights into design and safety from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
